Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: opaque white pigment [300013724], white pigment [300013723], pigment by color [300013134], pigments [300013109], colorant (material) [300013026], materials by function [300014692], materials (substances) [300010358], Materials (hierarchy name) [300010357], Materials Facet [300264091]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Synthetically produced white pigment; the oldest and most historically important white pigment as it was the only white used in European easel painting until the nineteenth century. By the twentieth century, the use of lead white had been replaced with titanium dioxide.
一種合成白色顏料，為歷史上最老且最重要的白色顏料，十九世紀前歐洲的架上畫只用這種白色。到了二十世紀，鉛白被二氧化鈦取代。

Source.Source_ID: 2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)
2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)

2000048849/Diccionario de Química y de productos químicos (1993)
2000051312/Bomford, Dunkerton, Gordon y Roy, La pintura italiana hasta 1400. Materiales, métodos y procedimientos de arte (1995)
2000093499/國家教育研究院－雙語詞彙、學術名詞暨辭書資訊網 28 July, 2014
